query:
SELECT DISTINCT split_part(e.source, '.', 1) AS "family!: String"
            FROM core.events e
            JOIN raw.source_material_registry sm ON sm.id = e.source_material_id
            WHERE ($1::timestamptz IS NULL OR sm.staged_at >= $1)
              AND e.source IS NOT NULL
              AND e.source <> ''
            ORDER BY 1
